---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for polyglotmesh
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behaviour
insufficient?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why are they worse?

## Impact

Who benefits from this change? (End users, operators, contributors.)

## Open questions

Anything that needs to be decided before implementation.
